The question is asking to determine the duration in years from the first race to the last race listed. Since the data is given in the "year" column, we can sort the years in either "small to large" or "large to small" order to identify the first and last race years and then calculate the difference. To ensure clarity, we should sort the data using the f_sort_column(year) operation to list the years in ascending order ("small to large").
The first race was in 1926 and the last race was in 1939. By subtracting 1926 from 1939, the duration is 13 years.
